current_phase_name: Slack approval gate (NOT started). Detour likely first: full-scope improvement plan (Dashboard rebuild + correctness/token/trend fixes).
current_phase_status: Phases 1-10 complete and Phase 10 VERIFIED green on 2026-06-06. All 14 read/analysis agents + 3 managers + synthesis layer run end-to-end. Decision pending: continue to Phase 11 (Slack gate) OR run the improvement plan to fix the two quality issues exposed during verification (same-day double-writes, over-aggressive dedup) plus the dead Dashboard.
architecture: Google Ads Script (collect) -> Apps Script Web App (ingest) | MULTI-LLM: Groq Llama 3.3 70B (8 reasoning agents) + Gemini 2.5 Flash (6 rule/data agents, thinking disabled) with automatic failover | Brain: Drive + ContentHunter RSS | 14 of 14 read/analysis agents live | Synthesis layer + live Dashboard built | Slack gate + Implementation fleet + Scheduling NOT built
verified_full_run_2026-06-06: testCampaignDirector: 14/14 agents ran, 0 failures, 76 findings -> 74 plan items (P1=19 P2=40 P3=15), 71646 total tokens (Groq ~45.2K, Gemini ~26.4K on separate quota = ~37% Groq offload), 270s. Batch-1 fixes CONFIRMED: double-write gone (76 findings not ~119), dedup healthy (76->74, only 2 merges vs old 119->73). NEW RISK: 270s runtime near Apps Script 6-min hard cap, driven by Groq 429 TPM sleeps (30s each) + Gemini 503 overload retries.

phases_built.10_synthesis: VERIFIED green 2026-06-06 (testSynthesisOnDate 2026-06-03: 119 findings -> 73 deduped -> 73 Action_Plan rows in 1.1s). Two quality issues exposed: (a) same-day double-writes inflated input to 119 [duplicate finding_ids in merge log], (b) dedup key (target_type,target_id,category) over-collapses distinct performance issues on same campaign into one plan row.
